chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. B.A. No. S- 1536 & 1542 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 21.01.2026 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case Applicants in Cr. Bail Appl. No. S- 1536 of 2025 are on interim pre- arrest bail. Mr. Ali Muhammad Memon, Advocate for applicants Ms. Sana Memon APG All the sections with which the applicants are charged are either bailable or fall within the non-prohibitory clause of Section 497 Cr.P.C. Scuffle broke out between two substantially large number of people in which people from both the sides were hurt and FIRs and counter FIRs were registered. It is yet to be seen who was the aggressor and who was aggressed upon. Malafide in view of the past inimical relations between the parties cannot be conclusively ruled out at this preliminary state. Given the above, the interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicants in Cr. Bail Application No. S- 1536 of 2025 is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. Applicant Ali Gohar in Cr. Bail Application No. S- 1542 of 2025 is admitted to post arrest bail subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs. 1,00,000/- (One Hundred Thousand) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of trial court. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
